description_long: This is a large, rectangular book with a dark brown, textured cover and thick, cream-colored pages visible along the sides. The cover features bold, gold-colored Chinese characters prominently displayed in a traditional calligraphic style. The book appears to be quite thick, with a substantial spine and a sturdy, hardbound construction. The edges of the pages are neatly aligned, and the corners of the cover are sharp and well-defined. There are no visible illustrations or decorative elements on the cover aside from the text. The overall appearance suggests a formal or archival volume, possibly a reference or anthology.
description: A thick, hardbound book with a dark brown textured cover and gold Chinese characters, featuring cream-colored pages and a sturdy, formal appearance.
description_view_0: The book is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the front cover with gold Chinese characters and the layered cream-colored pages along the right side.
description_view_1: This view highlights the book's spine and the thickness of the pages, with the gold characters on the cover partially visible.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible, showing the plain dark brown texture without any text or illustration, and the book's thickness is apparent.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the opposite end, displaying the cream-colored pages along the left side and the gold characters on the cover in full view.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is dark brown and textured, matching the cover, with no visible text or decorative elements.
